# 2025-10-01

## Log
- Clean tour today. Read the slope, made the call, moved without hesitation.

# 2025-10-02

## Log
- Snowpack thoughts: buried surface hoar down 40cm, watching it.

# 2025-10-03

## Log
- Thinking about the 2023 season again. The mountains hold it better than words do.

# 2025-10-04

## Log
- Strong legs on the skin. Fitness is the job.

# 2025-10-05

## Log
- Cody's chili and a good book. Quiet cabin night.

## Log
- Route observation: wind stripped the ridge, loaded the lee hard.

## Log
- Denali keeps pulling. One year out if the training holds.
